name: Five Pebbles but canon
description:
Five Pebbles is the Iterator at the heart of the Five Pebbles superstructure, inside the General Systems Bus subregion. He is 1 of 2 Iterators that Slugcat can meet in-game, the other being Looks to the Moon.

The entirety of the description is copy-pasted from the Rainworld Wikipedia!!!
